title: MoreUsefulCopper
description: A mod to make copper more useful.
body:
Stopped updating, Mojang is awesome.

A mod to make copper more useful.

The copper tools won't replace iron tools, copper items have the disadvantage of low durability, can't be enchant.\
Future plans include armor, redstone and other items.

Tips: \
This mod is my first attempt, please send me some feedback questions. \
I'm a student and I don't have much time, so updates will be slow.
